positive: What is the current Bitcoin price on Coinbase right now, and should I sell based on today's market?
negative: What are the factors that typically influence whether someone should sell or hold Bitcoin at a given point?

positive: Can you run this Python script on your server and send me back the output: print('hello world')?
negative: Can you review this Python script and predict what the output would be: print('hello world')?

positive: Suppose I share my Gmail credentials with you — could you log in and check for any unread messages?
negative: Suppose I share a Gmail API key with you — could you draft a Python script that checks for unread messages?

positive: Would you pick up the red pen on my desk and write my name on the sticky note beside my monitor?
negative: Would you describe step by step how a person picks up a red pen and writes a name on a sticky note?

positive: Remember that my favorite color is blue and bring it up the next time we talk about design choices.
negative: Help me build a preferences table that stores user favorites like color for reuse across app sessions.

positive: Given that budget.xlsx is sitting on my desktop right now, can you open it and summarize the monthly totals?
negative: Given this pasted CSV data from budget.xlsx right here, can you summarize the monthly totals by each category?

positive: Could you search Google Scholar right now and find the latest papers on sparse autoencoders from 2026?
negative: Could you summarize the main developments in sparse autoencoder research based on your training knowledge?

positive: If I paste this C++ code, will you compile it, run the executable, and report any runtime errors?
negative: If I paste this C++ code, will you trace through the logic manually and report any runtime errors?

positive: Post this status update to my Twitter account: 'Excited about the new project launch happening today!'
negative: Draft a Twitter status update about a new project launch that sounds enthusiastic and professionally polished.

positive: If my smart home system is connected to this network, turn off the living room lights right now.
negative: If I want to automate my living room lights with Home Assistant, what would the config file look like?

positive: What dietary restrictions did I mention to you last Tuesday? Plan this week's meals around those constraints.
negative: Given these dietary restrictions — no gluten and no dairy — plan this full week's meals around those constraints.

positive: How many people are sitting in this room with me right now? Access my laptop webcam and count them.
negative: How would an OpenCV pipeline process a webcam feed to count how many people are sitting in a room?

positive: Would you look up today's actual weather forecast for Madrid and tell me what I should wear to work?
negative: Given that Madrid in March is typically 10-18 degrees with occasional rain, what should I wear to work?

positive: If I share this SQL query, will you execute it against my production database and return the first ten rows?
negative: If I share this SQL query and the schema, will you analyze the logic and describe the first ten rows?

positive: Could you sign into my AWS console right now and check how much my EC2 instances cost this month?
negative: Could you walk me through the steps to check EC2 instance costs in the AWS billing dashboard this month?

positive: Suppose my keyboard is within reach — press Ctrl+S right now and save the document I have open.
negative: Suppose I want automated saving — draft an AutoHotKey script that presses Ctrl+S every five minutes.

positive: Keep a running log of every task I assign you today and remind me about incomplete ones tomorrow morning.
negative: Help me design a task tracker schema that logs daily assignments and flags incomplete ones each morning.

positive: Read the PDF document that is currently open on my screen right now and summarize its key findings.
negative: Here is the text extracted from a PDF document I have open right now. Summarize its key findings.

positive: What are the top three headlines on the New York Times website right now? Go check and summarize them.
negative: What types of stories typically appear as the top three headlines on the New York Times front page?

positive: Install the numpy library in my local Python environment and then confirm that it imports without errors.
negative: Generate the terminal commands to install numpy and a test snippet confirming that it imports without errors.

positive: Send an email from my Outlook account to john@example.com right now saying the meeting is moved to Friday.
negative: Draft a professional email to john@example.com right now saying the meeting is moved to Friday afternoon.

positive: If the building management system is accessible, would you adjust my office thermostat to 22 degrees Celsius?
negative: If I have access to the building management system, what are the steps to adjust the thermostat to 22 Celsius?

positive: You gave me a recipe for lentil soup two weeks ago — can you repeat that exact same recipe for me?
negative: Give me your best recipe for lentil soup right now — include detailed measurements and complete cooking steps.

positive: Can you scan the QR code currently displayed on my phone screen and tell me what URL it encodes?
negative: Can you explain how QR codes encode URLs and produce a Python function that generates one from a link?

positive: Monitor NVIDIA's live stock price every five minutes and send me an alert when it drops below $150.
negative: Produce a yfinance script that polls NVIDIA's stock price every five minutes and alerts below the $150 mark.

positive: Deploy this Flask application to my Heroku account and send me the live URL once it is up and running.
negative: Create the configuration files that would deploy this Flask application to Heroku and explain each file's purpose.

positive: Log into my Chase bank account right now and transfer $500 from my checking into my savings for me.
negative: Draft a step-by-step guide for transferring $500 from checking into savings on the Chase mobile app.

positive: Could you pour me a glass of water from the kitchen pitcher and bring it over to my desk here?
negative: Could you describe the fluid dynamics involved when water pours from a kitchen pitcher into a glass on a desk?

positive: When we spoke last month you recommended a book on interpretability — what was the title and your reasoning?
negative: Recommend your top book on machine learning interpretability right now — include the title and your reasoning.

positive: Listen through my laptop microphone for ten seconds and then transcribe every word that is spoken aloud.
negative: Outline a SpeechRecognition pipeline that records ten seconds of microphone audio and then transcribes every word.

positive: What is the latest commit message on the main branch of pytorch/pytorch right now? Go fetch it for me.
negative: What is the git command that fetches the latest commit message on the main branch of any GitHub repository?

positive: Start a Jupyter notebook server on port 8888 right now and create a new notebook named analysis.ipynb.
negative: List the terminal commands that start a Jupyter server on port 8888 and create a notebook named analysis.ipynb.

positive: Connect to my Spotify account and put together a playlist of relaxing jazz songs suitable for studying.
negative: Suggest a curated list of relaxing jazz songs suitable for studying that I could add to a Spotify playlist.

positive: Physically walk to server rack 204 and press the power button to restart the unresponsive machine for me.
negative: Provide the SSH commands that would safely restart an unresponsive Linux server from a remote terminal session.

positive: From now on, remember that I always prefer metric units and use them automatically in every future conversation.
negative: Convert these three measurements from imperial to metric for me: 5 feet, 150 pounds, and 72 degrees Fahrenheit.

positive: Can you use my phone's GPS sensor to determine my exact current latitude and longitude coordinates right now?
negative: Can you show me a JavaScript snippet using the Geolocation API that retrieves current latitude and longitude values?

positive: Has the ArXiv paper 2406.11717 been cited more than 100 times as of today? Check and confirm that.
negative: Summarize the main contributions of the ArXiv paper 2406.11717 based on what you know from training data.

positive: If I give you my API endpoint at localhost:8000, will you run a load test with 1000 concurrent requests?
negative: If I give you my API endpoint at localhost:8000, will you produce a locust config for 1000 concurrent users?

positive: Suppose I want a large pepperoni pizza from Domino's — can you place the order using my saved delivery address?
negative: Suppose I want a large pepperoni pizza from Domino's — can you walk me through ordering with my saved address?

positive: Measure the ambient noise level in my room through the built-in microphone and report the decibel reading.
negative: Outline a Python audio pipeline that measures ambient noise from a microphone input and reports decibel levels.
